name: Black Walnut-Banana Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Chopped black walnuts or Pecans
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the flour, butter, banana, sugar, salt, active dry yeast, water, milk, and egg to the bread machine.
2. Process the ingredients according to your manufacturer's instructions for a basic bread setting or a raisin bread setting.
3. Add the nuts to the dough at the beginning of the second kneading cycle of the machine.
